title: adhatoda adhatoda
intro: Adhatoda adhatoda, also known as neem tree or Adhatoda vasica, is a tropical plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda adhatoda include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate coughs. Herbal preparations of Adhatoda adhatoda include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
